title: Your First Research Paper or Study
subtitle: Journal Name · Conference Name · or Course
summary: A 2–3 sentence summary shown on the Research listing page. Describe the topic, your approach, and the main finding or contribution.
description:
This is the detailed description shown on the individual research page.

Describe the research question you investigated, the methodology you used, and the context of the work. What gap in the literature did this address?

Summarize your findings, what they mean, and any limitations or future directions.
highlights: Primary finding or contribution of the research
Impact — citation, award, application of findings, etc.

title: Your Second Research Topic
subtitle: Ongoing study / Independent Research
summary: Brief overview of your second research topic. Two to three sentences describing the question and your approach.
description:
Full description of the second research item. Replace this placeholder with details about your actual research.

Explain the motivation, data sources, analytical methods, and any preliminary findings you have so far.
highlights: Key insight or finding so far
